name: Sarah Mitchell
bio: Met freshman year of college. We backpacked through Southeast Asia together after graduation. She's now a UX designer in Austin.

name: Marcus Thompson
bio: Former manager who became a close friend. We play pickup basketball every few weeks and grab coffee to talk about career and life.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Grew up three houses apart. Our families spent every Diwali together. She's a pediatric nurse in Toronto now and we're terrible at keeping in touch.

name: Daniel Kim
bio: Met at a hackathon in college. We still do occasional weekend game sessions online. He's a backend engineer at a fintech startup in Seoul.

name: Amara Osei
bio: We started a two-person book club during lockdown that somehow kept going. She's a high school English teacher and has the sharpest literary opinions I've ever encountered.

name: Rafael Souza
bio: College roommate for two years. We were in the same indie band that never quite took off. Now he's an architect in São Paulo. Life drifted us apart but the bond is real.

name: Lena Hoffmann
bio: Met during a study abroad semester in Berlin. We've visited each other twice since then. She works in environmental policy and inspires me to think bigger about climate.

name: James Okonkwo
bio: We met at the local gym and bonded over cooking. Now we do a monthly 'cook-off' dinner where we each try a new cuisine. He's an immigration lawyer with a passion for Nigerian food.
